label: Aurorafall Habcell
description: Aurorafall Habcell is a compact residence built into the interlocked tiers of Nocturnis Bastion, its walls poured in slagcrete and faced with black vitrified panels to shed abrasive stormfall. Narrow bunks and fold-down fixtures line the perimeter, leaving a central aisle beneath a low ceiling ribbed with service conduits and insulated vox cabling. A sealed slit-window of armored glass admits the bruise-colored auroral glare in a controlled band, while gasketed vents and particulate filters keep ash and electrostatic grit from the living space. The entry bulkhead is overbuilt to the bastion standard, with recessed locking dogs and a pressure-rated frame suited to enclosed skyway life.
